title: Re-run Failed Automations
excerpt: It would be extremely helpful to have the ability to re-run a failed automation. Our HR (and other teams) use automations to send emails both internally and externally. When one of these automation fail due to a column v…

posts.author: jtholmer (Jeni Tholmer)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be extremely helpful to have the ability to re-run a failed automation. Our HR (and other teams) use automations to send emails both internally and externally. When one of these automation fail due to a column value missing, or an email account becoming disconnected, the only thing we can do is correct the issue for future use and hope it works the next time. If there were an option to re-run the automation that failed, this would save a ton of time on backtracking work and trying to recreate already templated emails.

posts.author: Bfly85 (Brianna Flynn)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed, use this all the time and it is very frustrating that I can’t rerun the automation.
